# ContLinks — Guest Post & Link Building Marketplace

## What is ContLinks?
ContLinks is a professional two-sided marketplace connecting advertisers (link buyers) with publishers (website owners) for high-quality guest posting, sponsored content, and link building campaigns.

## Core Capabilities
- **Catalogue**: Browse thousands of publisher websites filtered by niche, DA, traffic, price, and language.
- **Order Management**: Place, track, and manage guest post and link placement orders end-to-end.
- **Projects**: Advertisers can organise link building campaigns under named projects.
- **My Portals**: Publishers list and manage their own websites, set pricing, and track incoming orders.
- **Wallet**: Deposit funds, withdraw earnings, and review full transaction history.
- **Messages**: Real-time messaging between advertisers and publishers for content co-ordination.
- **Notifications**: Instant alerts for new orders, status changes, payments, and system events.
- **Support**: Ticket-based support centre with live chat widget.
- **Earnings Charts**: Visual dashboards for revenue trends, order volumes, and QA statistics.

## User Roles
- **Advertiser**: Buys guest posts and link placements; manages projects, catalogue shopping, purchases, and cart checkout.
- **Publisher**: Sells placements on own websites; manages portals, incoming orders, and earnings.

## Tech Stack
- React 18, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS
- Zustand for state management
- Recharts for data visualisation
- Radix UI primitives (accessible components)
- React Router DOM for routing

## Deployment
Live URL: https://contlinks.com
Sitemap: https://contlinks.com/sitemap.xml

## Intended Audience
Digital marketers, SEO professionals, content marketing managers, link builders, bloggers, and website owners looking to monetise their traffic or scale their backlink acquisition.
